item.title: Environmental Contaminants (Microplastics)
item.description:
• Summary: The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is moving to list microplastics as contaminants in water, reflecting increasing awareness of their potential health and environmental risks, which could have indirect implications for pharmaceutical manufacturing and safety.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Stat News

item.title: Chemistry & Molecular Properties
item.description:
• Summary: A scientific blog post explores the concept of 'chameleonicity' in chemistry, where molecules exhibit changing properties under different conditions, which is crucial for pharmaceutical applications like drug solubility and bioavailability in drug design.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Science
